steps.title: Spot the ordinal markers
steps.content: The passage contains “Second” and “Finally” introducing the second and third questions, indicating the first question requires the parallel ordinal marker.

steps.title: Apply the ordinal sequence
steps.content: ”First,” establishes the beginning of an ordinal series, creating parallel structure with “Second” and “Finally” to list the three research questions. The other choices either introduce causation (as a result), addition without ordinal position (additionally), or contrast (however)—none of which fit a numbered sequence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
